hero.title: Dining by the sea.
hero.subhead: Mediterranean cuisine, fish on the espeto and the day's fresh shellfish — since 2021 with a new look.
hero.imageAlt: View of La Caracola's dining room facing the Mediterranean at sunset

section2.eyebrow: Dining by the sea in Fuengirola
section2.title: Live a new experience at La Caracola
section2.body1: 2021 brought us a major refurbishment that gave the restaurant a fresh new look. The new design has given every space a more modern, more elegant feel inspired by the Mediterranean — with simple, recognisable symbolism that recalls the natural, fresh character of the sea.
section2.body2: A spacious dining room finished with exquisite detail will draw you into the blue of the sea, where you can savour a renewed, striking cuisine. The terrace, with views and private access to the beach, adds that touch where light and flavour come together in a new menu that combines traditional Mediterranean recipes with the latest avant-garde techniques.

section3.eyebrow: The beach restaurant in Fuengirola we'd want to eat at.
section3.title: Mediterranean Cuisine by the Sea
section3.body1: Set on the Paseo Marítimo, LA CARACOLA is the sum of everyone on the team. That's why we say our restaurant has soul.
section3.body2: The soul of those who, day after day, believe every dish is a unique experience — knowing that flavour comes from the harmonious combination of the very best ingredients.

essence.subhead: When professionalism meets effort and excitement.

editorial.title: La Caracola, the beach restaurant for lunch in Fuengirola
editorial.body: The beauty of RESTAURANTE LA CARACOLA lies in taste — in years of work and the effort to reach a result done right.

marLuz.title: We are sea, we are light, we are Mediterranean flavour
marLuz.bodyLeft: Back in the 90s, a Málaga family with a long culinary tradition committed to a new idea of cooking — one to be enjoyed with all five senses. A professional team, behind this great project from the start, has captured the spirit of those who love their work and believe that every recipe carries the feelings of its author.
marLuz.bodyRight1: We create unique experiences with distinctive flavours. We know that on a plate everything matters: the setting, the light, the wine you pair it with, the view and the company.
marLuz.bodyRight2: LA CARACOLA will keep pursuing its goal of becoming a standard-bearer for cuisine in Fuengirola — a delightful place to come with family and friends.

pillars.title: Tradition, freshness, detail, harmony and perfection
pillars.body: That is LA CARACOLA — and all of it is worth experiencing in a wonderful, unmatched setting. Light, flavour and sea breeze are the ingredients of a modern kitchen and the backdrop to a unique atmosphere in Fuengirola.

sister.eyebrow: If you prefer, visit us at our sister restaurant too:
sister.name: Restaurante Marisquería La Carihuela Chica
sister.body: At Restaurante Marisquería La Carihuela Chica you'll also enjoy excellent cuisine with family and friends. Striking views over Los Boliches beach and the high quality of fish, rice, shellfish and meats make this restaurant another great option for the finest Andalusian cooking.
sister.address: Plaza de San Rafael · Edf. Don Alberto · 29640 Los Boliches · Fuengirola · Málaga

hub.subhead: First-class ingredients in a unique setting
hub.title: The menu: gastronomic, traditional
hub.body: Our continuous service throughout the day gives each dish something special and a different journey — a menu that offers a unique gastronomic experience. This is our proposal.
hub.muchoGustoBody: Whether it's a modern dish or a traditional recipe, RESTAURANTE LA CARACOLA has chosen honest cooking — a menu built on the finest ingredients, where flavours blend in harmony. We're sure you'll be delighted. Here are a few must-try delicacies…

postres.intro: Made in-house, every day — with the calm they deserve.

vinos.intro: A visible, well-kept cellar where wine finds its place. A rotating selection of Spanish DOs, French champagnes and international references.

hero.subhead: When professionalism meets effort and excitement.

experience.title: An experience beyond the food
experience.body: Welcome to our restaurant — an idyllic spot on the beach where our team works every day to bring you the best of our cooking with warm, family-style service.

heritage.title: We are sea, we are light, we are Mediterranean flavour
heritage.body: Back in the 90s, a Málaga family with a long culinary tradition committed to a new idea of cooking — one to be enjoyed with all five senses. A professional team, behind this great project from the start, has captured the spirit of those who love their work and believe that every recipe carries the feelings of its author.

renovation.title: A fresh look in 2021
renovation.body: The new design gave every space a more modern, more elegant feel inspired by the Mediterranean — with simple, recognisable symbolism that recalls the natural, fresh character of the sea. A spacious dining room, a terrace with views and private beach access, and a visible wine cellar where wine finds its place.

tradicion.title: Tradition
tradicion.body: Andalusian recipes passed down through generations.

frescura.title: Freshness
frescura.body: Fish from the market, shellfish of the day.

detalle.title: Detail
detalle.body: Care on every plate, on every table.

armonia.title: Harmony
armonia.body: The setting, the light, the wine, the company.

perfeccion.title: Perfection
perfeccion.body: The result of years of work done well.

gallery.title: The restaurant
gallery.intro: Dining room, terrace, cellar — and the sea, always present.

footer.euCompliance: La Caracola S.L. has received funding from the European Union under the FEDER Operational Programme of Andalusia 2014-2020, financed as part of the EU response to the COVID-19 pandemic (REACT-EU), to offset the increased cost of natural gas and/or electricity for SMEs and self-employed workers especially affected by the rise in energy prices caused by Russia's war of aggression against Ukraine.

timeline.title: Three moments
timeline.ev1Body: A Málaga family with a long culinary tradition opens its doors facing the sea. Cooking is inherited — from the fire, the fish market, the long lunches.
timeline.ev2Body: A new look for every space — more modern, more elegant, inspired by the blue of the Mediterranean. The menu evolves; the recipe doesn't.
timeline.ev3Body: Continuous service, a terrace with private beach access, a visible cellar. The same idea — refined.

closing.subline: Lunch before 13:30. Dinner before 21:00. Continuous kitchen — come whenever, we'll be here.

cellar.title: A cellar
cellar.subline: Cared for, ever-changing — with room for what arrives from the Duero and what comes from Champagne. A rotating selection, not a closed catalogue.
cellar.altCaption: Glass of wine by the sea

place.title: Three spaces,
place.subline: Paseo Marítimo · private beach access · sea-horizon views.
place.p1Body: Spacious, dressed in blues — the light shifts with the hour and the sea is always there.
place.p2Body: Private beach access. Where lunch stretches on and the sun slows down.
place.p3Body: Visible from the dining room — bottles, vintages, a conversation waiting to happen.

meta.title: La Caracola · Dining by the sea in Fuengirola
meta.description: Restaurante La Caracola — Mediterranean cuisine, fish on the espeto and the day's fresh shellfish on the Paseo Marítimo, Fuengirola.
